commands.repair_reason: Human review should wait on contributor-supplied live behavior proof and maintainer stack sequencing; there is no narrow automation repair to queue.; Cleared: No concrete security regression found; the tool-event stack sanitizes args/results before shared bus emission, but that boundary still needs maintainer sequencing. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude CLI JSONL parser callbacks/types for tool-use, tool-result, and thinking deltas, wires tool events through the CLI lifecycle to channel preview callbacks, and expands parser/bridge tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the parser gap: current main only surfaces assistant text deltas, while Anthropic documents `thinking_delta` events for streamed thinking. No live current-main or after-patch runtime reproduction was performed in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review should wait on contributor-supplied live behavior proof and maintainer stack sequencing; there is no narrow automation repair to queue.
